vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-setup
vBRIEFInfo.description: README, usage docs, and sample gallery

plan.title: Docs and README — install, usage, gallery

narratives.Overview: Ship user-facing docs so the tool is discoverable and learnable without reading source.
narratives.Acceptance: README.md at project root covers: what qr23mf is, install (uv tool / pipx / from source), quickstart (single command), full flag reference (mirrors --help), two-color printing tips, a short FAQ, and a sample gallery (3-5 rendered previews at the top). docs/ directory includes PRINTING.md with tips for slicer setup (dual extruder assignment, bed adhesion, recommended layer height). Every flag in the CLI scope is documented exactly once in the README; a test parses --help output and asserts 1:1 coverage.
narratives.Scope: README.md, docs/PRINTING.md, docs/gallery/*.png (renders produced by the tool itself). Keep copy tight (≤400 lines total README).
